channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nine arrested after disorder at north London football parade following Champions League final defeat
item.description: Nine people were arrested during a large-scale football parade in north London that descended into disorder following Arsenal’s Champions League final defeat to Paris Saint-Germain. The Metropolitan P...

item.title: Retired federal judge criticizes proposed Trump administration policy limiting federal workers’ speech
item.description: A retired federal judge has criticized a reported Trump administration effort to require federal employees to sign nondisclosure agreements and restrict their ability to publicly discuss internal gove...

item.title: Software Engineering’s Reliance on Informal Knowledge and Its Limits in the Age of AI
item.description: The article examines how modern software development heavily depends on informal, undocumented, or poorly documented knowledge—often passed through conversations, code comments, or short-lived interna...

item.title: Greater Sudbury family seeks to retain pet wolf-dog amid provincial seizure review
item.description: A family in Greater Sudbury is attempting to keep their six-year-old pet, Onyx, a wolf-dog hybrid, after Ontario’s Ministry of Natural Resources (MNR) indicated he may be seized pending DNA test resul...

item.title: Father’s struggle to repatriate his son’s remains from the Ukraine front lines
item.description: The article focuses on the emotional and bureaucratic struggle of a father attempting to recover and bring home the remains of his son, who died on the front lines of the Russia-Ukraine war. The story...

item.title: Word of the Day: SOGIESC (Sexual Orientation, Gender Identity, Expression, and Sex Characteristics)
item.description: The article from ABS-CBN Lifestyle introduces the Word of the Day for June 1, 2026, which is the term SOGIESC. This acronym stands for Sexual Orientation, Gender Identity, Gender Expression, and Sex C...

item.title: Federal Government begins nationwide ranching and grazing reserve revival to reduce farmer-herder clashes
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria has commenced efforts to revive ranching systems and grazing reserves across the country as part of a long-term strategy to reduce recurring conflicts between farmers...

item.title: How a Single Meal Can Influence Your Eating Habits
item.description: This article explores the idea that a single meal has the potential to influence long-term eating habits. While it may sound surprising, research suggests that meals prepared with fresh, balanced, and...

item.title: Come From Away opens in Calgary with energetic debut celebrating Canadian community spirit
item.description: The opening night of Come From Away at Calgary’s Max Bell Theatre turned into a lively and emotional celebration, capturing the spirit of Canadian hospitality and resilience. The musical, which tells ...

item.title: Visa delays disrupt Bafana Bafana’s planned departure for World Cup preparations in Mexico
item.description: Bafana Bafana’s preparations for the FIFA World Cup 2026 have been thrown into disarray after visa complications prevented the team from travelling to Mexico as scheduled. The squad had been due to de...

item.title: Zelensky urges renewed peace talks with Russia amid shifting battlefield dynamics and escalating strikes
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has called for renewed diplomatic efforts with Russia, arguing that the coming months before winter present a critical window for negotiations. He claims that Ru...

item.title: Canada midfielder Marcelo Flores ruled out of World Cup after ACL injury
item.description: Canada midfielder Marcelo Flores will miss the upcoming World Cup after suffering a serious knee injury while playing for his club side Tigres UNAL in the CONCACAF Champions Cup. According to Canada’s...

item.title: High Court confirms life imprisonment for child rape, citing severity and lack of mitigating factors
item.description: The Pietermaritzburg High Court has upheld a life sentence handed down to a man convicted of raping his five-year-old cousin on Christmas Day in 2019, rejecting his appeal for a reduced sentence. The ...

item.title: Maki joins TNVS drivers for a joyful segment on Everybody Sing
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios recently featured Maki in a lively segment of their popular TV show 'Everybody Sing,' where she joined the Songbayanang TNVS drivers for a fun and interactive ride. The segment highlig...

item.title: Tinubu Orders Full Effort to Rescue Abducted Teachers and Students in Oyo State
item.description: The abduction of teachers and students from multiple schools in Oyo State has shaken the nation and drawn international attention. Femi Gbajabiamila, Chief of Staff to President Bola Tinubu, stated th...

item.title: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner Wed in London Ahead of Italian Wedding Celebration
item.description: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner have officially married in a private legal ceremony at the Old Marylebone Town Hall in London. The couple, who began their relationship in 2024, exchanged vows on Sunday mor...

item.title: Lipulekh Pass Dispute: India–Nepal Border Tensions Over Historic Boundary and Kailash Mansarovar Route
item.description: The Lipulekh Pass, situated in the high Himalayas at the trijunction of India, Nepal and China, has once again become a focal point of diplomatic tension between India and Nepal. The pass, located in ...

item.title: South African Farmers Face Increased Costs Amid Interest Rate Hike and Inflation
item.description: South African farmers are facing mounting financial pressures following the Reserve Bank's recent decision to increase the repo rate by 25 basis points to 7%, which also lifted the prime lending rate....

item.title: Celebrity partners attend Soccer Aid 2026 at London Stadium to support star-studded charity match
item.description: The 2026 Soccer Aid charity match at the London Stadium brought together a wide range of celebrity partners and supporters, often referred to as WAGs, who attended to cheer on the participating player...

item.title: Eight Killed in Israeli Airstrike on Southern Lebanon, Including Women and Children
item.description: On Sunday, May 31, 2026, an Israeli dawn airstrike targeted the town of Deir Zahrani in the Nabatieh district of southern Lebanon, resulting in the deaths of eight people, including three women. Accor...
